tasks.title: Initialize Python project
tasks.description: Create a pyproject.toml with project metadata, a src/hello/ package with __init__.py, and a tests/ directory with conftest.py. Use pytest as the test framework.

tasks.title: Create greeting function
tasks.description: Create src/hello/greet.py with a greet(name: str) -> str function that returns 'Hello, {name}!'

tasks.title: Add tests for greeting
tasks.description: Create tests/test_greet.py with unit tests covering the greet function: valid input, empty string, special characters.
acceptance_criteria: All tests pass with python -m pytest

tasks.title: Add CLI entry point
tasks.description: Create src/hello/cli.py with a Click CLI that takes --name and prints the greeting. Register it in pyproject.toml as 'hello' console script.
